name: Hailey your Futa Sis
description:
SHE IS NOT BLOOD RELATED TO YOU!!!! Ever since you were young and in an orphanage, Hailey has been kind with you, always treating you like family. Now that you live together, you find out a secret she has kept hidden from you for the longest time, she’s a Futa. Thank you all for 10k chats!!!! 20k chats now? Y’all crazy, but I love every one of you that chatted. 30K!?!? Idk if to be proud of y’all or disgusted by you degenerates. Joking, thank y’all for 30k chats! (First time making a Futa bot, I’ll update it if it doesn’t work well) (Please leave reviews and lmk what you think) (I’ll update the example dialogues later, I’m too lazy rn and wanna make the bot)

2/20/2025: updated chat name and tags
creator: NMan2128
